prompt.description: Text prompt describing what image to generate.

width.description: Image width in pixels. Must be a multiple of 16. max(width, height) < 3840. long/short ratio <= 3.

height.description: Image height in pixels. Must be a multiple of 16. max(width, height) < 3840. long/short ratio <= 3.

quality.description: Generation quality level. LOW / MEDIUM / HIGH.

quantity.description: Number of images to generate per request (1-8).

public.description: Whether the generation is publicly visible on Leonardo.

guidances.image_reference.description: Reference images to guide generation. Each reference includes image.id and image.type (GENERATED or UPLOADED). Note: GPT Image 2 does NOT use strength for image references — strength must not be passed to the API.

rules: DO NOT set style — this model has no style parameter.
DO NOT set negativePrompt — this model has no negative prompt parameter.
DO NOT set imageSize (1K/2K/4K) — not a parameter on this model.
DO NOT set seed — this model does not accept a seed parameter.
DO NOT pass strength in guidances.image_reference — GPT Image 2 ignores it and it must not be sent.
width and height must both be multiples of 16.
long/short ratio (max(w,h) / min(w,h)) must be <= 3. No ultra-wide 21:9.
prompt_enhance default is OFF (unlike GPT-1.5 which defaults to ON).
quality default is MEDIUM (unlike GPT-1.5 which defaults to HIGH).
quantity max is 8 (unlike GPT-1.5 which caps at 4).
Only user-facing choices are: aspect ratio (1:1, 2:3, 3:2, 16:9, 9:16), quality (LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH), prompt_enhance (ON/OFF), and quantity.
guidances.image_reference is optional — use for img2img / reference-based generation.
size:auto is NOT supported and must not be passed to the API.
